series_metadata.series_description: Trade job search and relocation contracts, expenses and payments.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronic documents for 4 years, then destroy provided federal audit complete, the report is released and all discrepancies have been resolved. ; Paper: Retain 30 days after hardcopy is prepped, scanned (imaged), and quality control is complete then destroyed., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
